name_cn:
Genuine Grade
🌟(Waxed Leather 3-in-1)
2023 New Hobo style from the factory in waxed leather. Comes with a keychain, detachable adjustable logo fabric shoulder strap, detachable zippered leather pouch, and detachable metal chain strap. Top zipper closure, nylon lining, and enamel triangle metal logo.
Size: 22L x 18H x 6.5W cm
Style: 1BH204 Waxed Leather
